title: POS Tagging & Named Entity Recognition
content:
# POS Tagging & NER

## 1. HMM Joint Probability
$$P(\mathbf{x}, \mathbf{y}) = \prod_{t=1}^T P(y_t \mid y_{t-1}) P(x_t \mid y_t)$$
*   **Transition:** $P(y_t \mid y_{t-1}) = \frac{C(y_{t-1}, y_t)}{C(y_{t-1})}$
*   **Emission:** $P(x_t \mid y_t) = \frac{C(y_t, x_t)}{C(y_t)}$

## 2. Viterbi Trellis Update
$$v_t(j) = \max_{i} [ v_{t-1}(i) \times P(y_t=j \mid y_{t-1}=i) ] \times P(x_t \mid y_t=j)$$
*   Reduces decoding complexity from $O(N^T)$ to $O(N^2 T)$.
